# Template Builder Phase 6 — Address Blocks and Custom Placeholder Dialog Repair

This phase repairs the Build Template pre-generation surface only.

Locked scope:

- Added canonical full-address-block tokens for insurer and adversary.
- Resolved those address-block tokens from the live example preview resolver where source address data exists.
- Restored a visible Custom Placeholder dialog entry point.
- Kept custom placeholders as review aids until document-by-document canonical token replacement.
- Did not implement template generation.
- Kept readiness cards and readiness intro copy out of Build Template.
